caption:
Neon lights hit my skin like a fever, pulsing in rhythm with my heartbeat. 🌃

I stride through the rain-slicked alleyways of Sector 7, the sound of my synthetic heels clicking against the grime. My black latex trench coat whispers against the walls, hiding the shimmering silver bodysuit underneath that clings to every curve. I can feel the weight of the data chip in my palm, humming with stolen secrets. 

Tonight’s target is a high-level corporate drop. The doors of the VIP lounge hiss open, revealing a haze of purple and gold lights. The air smells like ozone and expensive perfume. I slide the chip into the terminal, feeling the heat radiate through my fingertips. My corseted waist flexes as I lean forward, the holographic collar of my jacket glowing against my skin. 

A shadow looms behind me. A man in a sleek suit steps forward, his cybernetic eye scanning mine. A grin spreads across my lips. 'You found the drop, did you?' I purr, feeling the power surge through my suit. He reaches out, fingers brushing my arm, and the electricity jumps between us. The city lights blur, and I know I’ve won the night. 

#cyberpunk #neonnight #futureaesthetic #digitalglamour #cyberpunkfashion #sci-firomance #techwear
